name: Pasta with Chicken and Four Cheeses -Kvnh17b
recipeInstructions:
Melt 1 tablespoon butter with olive oil in a heavy large saucepan over medium-low heat. Add onion and cook until translucent, stirring occasionally for about 10 minutes.
Add garlic and stir for 1 minute.
Blend in the canned plum tomatoes (drained).
Increase heat to medium-high and simmer uncovered until thickened, stirring occasionally for about 10 minutes.
Season lightly with salt and generously with fresh ground pepper.
Bring cream to a boil in a heavy large skillet.
Reduce heat and simmer until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tomato sauce. Keep the sauce warm.
Cook pasta in a large amount of boiling salted water until al dente. When the pasta is almost done, return the sauce to simmer. Add chicken to the sauce and stir until pieces are just firm for about 2 minutes. Blend in the cheeses and remaining 5 tablespoons butter. Drain the pasta.
Add to the sauce, tossing to coat. Adjust seasoning.
Spoon mixture into heated bowls. Garnish with minced parsley and serve. Pass additional grated cheese separately.
(Note: Parmesan can be substituted for pecorino, and Bel Paese can be substituted for Fontina.)
